FOXO Technologies ( (FOXO) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 27, 2026, FOXO Technologies’ majority stockholder, Rennova Health, approved by written consent an amendment to FOXO’s Certificate of Incorporation to increase authorized Class A common shares from 10 billion to 25 billion, with the effective date left to the discretion of FOXO’s board. FOXO filed a preliminary Schedule 14C information statement with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on April 1, 2026, and the share increase will become effective 20 days after mailing of the definitive statement to stockholders of record as of March 20, 2026, signaling a major expansion of the company’s capacity to issue equity.

The move consolidates the CEO-controlled majority stockholder’s influence over FOXO’s capital structure, as no further stockholder approval will be required before the amendment is filed. This substantial increase in authorized shares could have significant implications for future financings, potential dilution, and the company’s strategic flexibility in pursuing corporate transactions or restructuring options.

The most recent analyst rating on (FOXO) stock is a Hold with a $0.01 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on FOXO Technologies stock, see the FOXO Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Cameco Files 2025 Modern Slavery Report Detailing Supply Chain Risk Controls
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Cameco ( (TSE:CCO) ) is now available.

Cameco has issued its 2025 Modern Slavery Report for the financial year ended December 31, 2025, outlining how it addresses the risks of forced and child labour across its operations and Canadian supply chains under Canada’s new Fighting Against Forced Labour and Child Labour in Supply Chains Act. The report covers Cameco Corporation and Cameco Fuel Manufacturing, underscoring a corporate culture grounded in safety, environment, people, integrity, and excellence, and formalizing human rights commitments through internal and supplier codes of conduct.

The company reports that its producing, care-and-maintenance and exploration assets in Canada, the United States and Australia are located in jurisdictions with relatively low modern-slavery risk, and that most of its roughly $1.264 billion of 2025 procurement spend for Canadian operations went to suppliers in Canada and the U.S., further reducing exposure. Cameco sourced inputs from about 2,061 suppliers and 9.6 million pounds of uranium from 11 counterparties, and says it does not knowingly buy directly from the highest‑risk countries identified by Walk Free, while acknowledging limited visibility beyond its direct suppliers, a gap that could draw investor and regulatory scrutiny as supply chain due‑diligence expectations rise.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:CCO) stock is a Hold with a C$155.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cameco stock, see the TSE:CCO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CCO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CCO is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improved financial performance (strong 2025 profitability and cash flow with low leverage) and a supportive earnings outlook/strategic positioning from the latest call. Offsetting factors are weak near-term technical momentum and a demanding valuation (very high P/E with minimal dividend yield).

To see Spark’s full report on CCO stock, click here.

More about Cameco

Cameco Corporation is a nuclear energy company that has supplied nuclear fuel for more than 35 years to a global customer base seeking safe, secure, carbon-free and affordable baseload power. Listed on the TSX and NYSE and headquartered in Saskatoon, it operates across the nuclear fuel cycle, from uranium mining in Canada and the U.S. to refining, conversion, and CANDU fuel manufacturing in Ontario through Cameco Fuel Manufacturing.

The group also holds stakes in Westinghouse Electric Company and Global Laser Enrichment to extend its reach into fuel fabrication, services, and advanced enrichment technology, and a 40% interest in Kazakhstan-based JV Inkai. As of December 31, 2025, Cameco and its wholly owned subsidiaries employed 3,082 people, with 868 covered by unions or collective bargaining, and it emphasizes local procurement, particularly in Canada and the United States.

Average Trading Volume: 1,087,940

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$67.24B

data.title: Lipocine weighs path after LPCN 1154 Phase 3 miss
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Lipocine ( (LPCN) ) has issued an announcement.

On April 2, 2026, Lipocine reported topline results from a Phase 3 placebo-controlled trial of LPCN 1154, an oral formulation of brexanolone for postpartum depression, in 90 patients. The study did not meet its primary endpoint, as LPCN 1154 failed to show a statistically significant reduction in HAM-D17 scores versus placebo at hour 60 in the overall population, although the drug was well tolerated with no treatment-related serious adverse events or discontinuations and a safety profile compatible with outpatient use.

A post hoc analysis in a 54-patient subset with a history of psychiatric conditions showed nominally significant and clinically meaningful HAM-D improvements versus placebo as early as 12 hours and sustained through day 30, suggesting a potential targeted development path despite the overall miss. Based on these subset findings, Lipocine has applied for U.S. regulatory designations for LPCN 1154 and plans to preserve capital while engaging investors, regulators, and advisors to weigh options ranging from further validation studies of LPCN 1154 to refocusing on other pipeline candidates or pursuing strategic transactions, decisions that could materially influence its positioning in the competitive postpartum depression market and its broader pipeline priorities.

The most recent analyst rating on (LPCN) stock is a Hold with a $8.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Lipocine stock, see the LPCN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on LPCN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, LPCN is a Neutral.

Overall score is held down primarily by weak/volatile financial performance and poor cash-flow quality, alongside bearish technical momentum. Positive Phase 3 trial progress provides a meaningful offset, but valuation support is limited given ongoing losses and a negative P/E.

To see Spark’s full report on LPCN stock, click here.

More about Lipocine

Lipocine Inc. is a NASDAQ-listed biopharmaceutical company that uses a proprietary technology platform to develop innovative orally delivered therapies targeting large markets with significant unmet medical needs. Its pipeline spans candidates for postpartum and treatment-resistant depression, epilepsy, essential tremor, obesity-related body composition, liver cirrhosis symptoms, and prevention of preterm birth, alongside TLANDO, an FDA-approved oral testosterone prodrug for hypogonadism in adult males.

Lipocine’s portfolio is focused on differentiated, patient-friendly oral delivery options that seek favorable benefit‑risk profiles across endocrine, neurological, psychiatric, and maternal health indications. The company is also exploring partnerships and strategic options to advance and monetize its pipeline assets, reflecting an emphasis on both clinical development and capital-efficient growth strategies.

Average Trading Volume: 128,180

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $67.52M

Oncotelic Therapeutics ( (OTLC) ) has issued an announcement.

On April 2, 2026, Oncotelic Therapeutics, Inc., a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on oncology and AI-driven solutions, announced a strategic partnership with TechForce Robotics to commercialize an integrated PDAOAI-enabled, GMP-compliant robotics platform. The collaboration combines Oncotelic’s proprietary AI technology with TechForce’s robotics hardware and manufacturing expertise to support automated, compliant workflows in pharmaceutical manufacturing and other regulated settings.

The system is designed for GMP-regulated environments, enabling automated material handling, real-time monitoring, and AI-enhanced compliance workflows aimed at reducing human intervention and contamination risks while improving process consistency. The announcement followed the execution of a joint development, manufacturing, and licensing agreement that sets a framework for ongoing collaboration, scaling production, and commercial deployment of PDAOAI-enhanced robotic systems.

By targeting intensifying regulatory scrutiny and the industry’s push to reduce manual processes, the partners are positioning the platform to address growing demand for intelligent, scalable, and compliant automation solutions. If successfully commercialized, the initiative could enhance Oncotelic’s role at the intersection of oncology, AI, and pharmaceutical manufacturing technology, while broadening TechForce’s presence in high-value, regulated markets.

data.title: Decoy Therapeutics Regains Nasdaq Compliance After Reverse Split
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Decoy Therapeutics ( (DCOY) ) has shared an announcement.

Decoy Therapeutics has regained compliance with Nasdaq’s minimum bid price requirement after a period of deficiency that began with a notice on December 31, 2025, when its shares traded below $1.00 for 30 consecutive business days. Following a February 6, 2026 hearing with a Nasdaq panel, the company executed a reverse stock split effective March 6, 2026, leading to a closing bid of $7.47 on March 20, 2026 and demonstrating at least ten consecutive days above the $1.00 threshold.

On March 31, 2026, Nasdaq formally notified Decoy that it was again in compliance with Listing Rule 5550(a)(2) and all other continued listing standards for the Nasdaq Capital Market, securing its listing status. However, the company will remain under a Mandatory Panel Monitor until March 31, 2027, meaning any renewed breach of the bid-price rule during this period could trigger an automatic delisting determination, underscoring ongoing listing risk for shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (DCOY) stock is a Hold with a $6.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Decoy Therapeutics stock, see the DCOY Stock Forecast page.

data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Olenox Industries ( (OLOX) ) is now available.

At its 2025 annual meeting held on March 31, 2026, Olenox Industries’ stockholders re-elected seven directors, ratified RBSM LLP as auditor for 2025, and approved executive compensation on an advisory basis. Shareholders also authorized significant share-related measures, including a steep increase in authorized common stock to 3 billion shares, an expanded and auto-escalating stock incentive plan, and Nasdaq-compliant issuances of more than 20% of outstanding stock to Generating Alpha and JAK Industrial Ventures.

Investors further approved a reverse stock split in a 1-for-10 to 1-for-20 range and gave the board authority to adjourn the meeting if needed, though no adjournment was required. However, they rejected a proposed merger with New Asia Holdings and the associated conversion of Series A preferred stock, a decision that preserves Olenox’s standalone strategy while giving management broad flexibility to raise capital, manage dilution, and address listing requirements through future equity issuances and the potential reverse split.

The most recent analyst rating on (OLOX) stock is a Hold with a $1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Olenox Industries stock, see the OLOX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on OLOX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, OLOX is a Neutral.

data.title: Auddia Implements Reverse Stock Split and Amends Charter
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Auddia ( (AUUD) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On March 30, 2026, Auddia Inc. filed a Certificate of Amendment in Delaware to implement a 1-for-7.7 reverse stock split of its common stock, which became effective at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time on March 31, 2026. At the effective time, every 7.7 issued and outstanding shares were automatically combined into one share, with no change to par value, and stockholders entitled to fractional shares received one whole share instead.

Following the reverse split, Auddia’s issued and outstanding common shares fell from about 3.9 million to roughly 500,000, while the authorized share count remained at 100 million. Trading on a split-adjusted basis on Nasdaq began on April 1, 2026, and the split also proportionately adjusted the company’s convertible preferred stock, warrants, stock options, and restricted stock units, including their associated exercise prices.

The reverse stock split ratio, initially authorized by the board and stockholders in May 2025 within a wider range, was finalized by the board at 1-for-7.7 in March 2026. The move materially increases Auddia’s per-share trading price and reduces its share count, affecting all existing equity-linked securities and potentially influencing market perception and liquidity for shareholders.

More about Auddia

Auddia Inc. operates in the digital audio and radio technology sector, focusing on delivering enhanced listening experiences through its software and streaming solutions. The company is listed on Nasdaq, where its common stock is actively traded by public market investors and other stakeholders.

Average Trading Volume: 299,623

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

On April 1, 2026, CytoSorbents Corporation disclosed that Nasdaq granted the company a 180-day extension, until September 28, 2026, to regain compliance with the $1.00 minimum bid price requirement for continued listing. First Majestic Silver ( (TSE:AG) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 2, 2026, First Majestic Silver announced a detailed restart plan for its 100%-owned Jerritt Canyon Gold Mine in Nevada, which has been on care and maintenance since March 2023. The company aims to resume gold production in the second half of 2027, underpinned by a newly expanded mineral resource base totaling 4.1 million ounces of measured and indicated gold and 3.7 million ounces of inferred resources as of December 31, 2025.

First Majestic plans to invest $75 million in 2026 to rehabilitate underground operations, advance open-pit potential, upgrade the processing plant, expand drilling and bolster staffing, supported by a pre-feasibility study from Stantec due in Q4 2026. The restart strategy, which follows the completed integration of Gatos Silver, is intended to optimize long-term, low-cost production in a strong gold price environment and could enhance the company’s growth profile and value proposition for investors if execution and market conditions align.

data.title: Braskem Signs BRL 226 Million Related-Party Steam Supply Deal for Cubatão Plant
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Braskem SA ( (BAK) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 23, 2026, Braskem entered into a related-party agreement with Petrocoque S.A. Indústria e Comércio, a company jointly controlled by Petrobras, for the purchase of steam to supply Braskem’s PE8 plant in Cubatão, São Paulo. The contract, effective from March 25, 2026, to March 24, 2031 and extendable to 2033, has an estimated total value of BRL 226 million and secures a critical energy input from Petrocoque, the only available supplier in the region.

Braskem’s management stated that, despite the related-party nature of the deal, no representatives of Petrocoque or its shareholders took part in Braskem’s internal decision-making, and a competitiveness analysis concluded that the agreed steam prices align with market conditions at other units. The long-term supply arrangement underpins operational continuity at the Cubatão PE8 unit while addressing governance and pricing concerns that are often scrutinized in related-party transactions, which may help reassure investors and regulators about the transaction’s fairness.

The most recent analyst rating on (BAK) stock is a Hold with a $3.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Braskem SA stock, see the BAK Stock Forecast page.

BAK scores low primarily due to very weak financial performance—losses, negative/volatile cash generation, and a highly stressed balance sheet with negative equity and heavy leverage. The company is a key player in Latin America’s petrochemical industry and maintains plants in several Brazilian states, including São Paulo and Bahia.

Sportsman’s Warehouse faces meaningful financial risk if it proceeds with closing underperforming stores, as recent impairment charges of $17.8 million on ten locations highlight the potential burden of exit costs. In addition to further impairment, lease termination penalties, ongoing rent obligations, write-offs of leasehold improvements, and severance may weigh on cash flows and reduce net sales from a smaller store base.

Because all locations are leased, the company may be locked into unfavorable lease terms even after a closure decision, forcing it to carry fixed occupancy costs without corresponding revenue. While management’s intent is to enhance portfolio productivity, the timing of closures—particularly after the 2026 holiday season—could compress near‑term margins and introduce volatility into its results of operations.

data.title: Market Volatility in Equity Securities Puts enCore Energy’s Earnings and Liquidity at Risk
data.description:
enCore Energy (TSE:EU) has disclosed a new risk, in the Debt & Financing category.

End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Fluctuations in the fair value of enCore Energy’s marketable equity securities expose it to earnings volatility that is largely driven by external market forces beyond management’s control. Because these securities are marked to fair value through earnings, even short‑term unrealized losses can materially distort reported profitability, cash flows, and key performance metrics.

If adverse market conditions or issuer‑specific events force enCore Energy to divest positions during downturns, realized losses could directly weaken its liquidity and overall financial condition. This volatility in both unrealized and realized results may reduce the predictability of its financial performance from period to period and complicate capital planning and investor assessment.
